restorePurchaseMessage: To restore a purchase, go to your app store account settings and tap Restore.
newerVersionAvailable: A newer AI model is available. Update to get improved responses and new features.
downloadAiModelDesc: The AI Companion needs to download a language model to provide personalized guidance on your device.
deleteModelConfirm: Delete this model? The downloaded file will be freed.
bookmarkHint: Bookmark advice cards from the Advice tab to save them here for quick reference.
routineComingSoonDesc: We're creating a personalized routine for this stage. Check back soon!
basicModeDesc: Content cards only, no on-device AI
contentCardsOnly: Content cards only, no on-device AI
downloadModelBelow: Download a model below to enable on-device AI.
modelsRunOnDevice: Models run entirely on your device. Nothing is sent to the cloud.
premiumRequired: Better Quality requires a Premium subscription.
becauseYourLittleOne: Because your little one matters most
deviceNotSupported: Your device does not support on-device AI. Using parenting content cards instead (no internet required).
failedToLoadModel: Failed to load AI model. Please try downloading it again.
usingOfflineConfig: Using offline model configuration. Consider checking your connection for the latest model.
aiCompanionUnavailable: AI Companion unavailable. Using parenting content cards instead.
aboutAiCompanionDialog: The AI Companion runs entirely on your device. Nothing you type is sent to the cloud. Responses are generated locally and are not reviewed by humans. Always consult your healthcare provider for medical decisions.
emergencyWarning:
**MEDICAL EMERGENCY**

Based on what you've described, this could be serious. Please stop using this app and contact emergency services or your doctor immediately.
modelNotLoaded: AI model not loaded. Please download the model first.
couldNotLoadModel: Couldn't load model. Switched to Basic mode.
noBabyMonForCompanion: Create your first BabyMon to access AI-powered parenting guidance.
savedCardsUpgradeDesc: Upgrade to Premium to bookmark and save expert advice cards for quick access.
expertAdviceUpgradeDesc: Upgrade to Premium to get stage-specific expert advice from pediatricians and child development specialists.
bookmarkHintDetail: Bookmark advice cards from the Advice tab to save them here for quick reference.
readCarefullySubtitle: Please read carefully before using the AI Companion
notMedicalDeviceDesc: BabyMon is not a medical device. It does not diagnose, treat, or provide medical advice.
notForEmergenciesDesc: If your child needs immediate medical attention, call 911 (or your local emergency number). Do not use the AI Companion for emergencies.
onDeviceAiNoReviewDesc: The AI Companion runs entirely on your device. No professional reviews individual responses before you see them. AI-generated advice may be inaccurate, incomplete, or not applicable to your child.
youAreResponsibleDesc: You must independently verify any AI Companion advice with a qualified healthcare professional before acting on it. You assume all risks when using this feature.
dataStaysOnDeviceDesc: No child health data is sent to external AI services. All AI inference happens locally on your phone.
understandAcceptCheckbox: I understand that the AI Companion is not a substitute for professional medical advice. I accept all risks associated with using AI-generated parenting guidance.
parentingCoachOnDevice:
A parenting coach that runs entirely on your phone.
Nothing leaves your device.
skipUseBasic: Skip for now — use basic mode
deleteModelConfirmBody: Delete this model? The downloaded file will be freed.
requiresSubscription: Better Quality requires a Premium subscription.
whatShouldMyBabySleep: What should my 4-month-old's sleep schedule look like?
isItNormalRefuseSolids: Is it normal for my baby to refuse solids at 6 months?
whenConcernedFever: When should I be concerned about a fever?
poweredByOnDeviceAi: I'm powered by an on-device AI that runs entirely on your phone. Nothing you share leaves your device. Ask me anything about your baby's development, sleep, feeding, or health — but always consult your doctor for medical concerns.
gentleReminderMessage: We love that you trust BabyMon. Your little one deserves the very best — and so do you. That's why we want to be completely transparent about how our AI Companion works.
aiNotDoctorWarning: Our AI Companion runs on your device...but it is not a doctor. It doesn't have a medical license, and it never will. It's a helpful companion that can answer questions and provide general parenting guidance.
alwaysCheckPediatrician: Always check with your pediatrician before making medical decisions.
callDoctorRightAway: Call your doctor right away if you notice anything concerning about your baby's health.
useAsStartingPoint: Use our parenting advice as a starting point — not as a replacement for professional care.
callEmergencyImmediately: In an emergency, call 911 immediately. Don't wait. Don't hesitate.
youAreDoingAmazing:
You're doing an amazing job.
We just want to make sure you have the full picture.
discoverComingSoon: Discover features: Tips, community content, stage-based insights, and more!
couldNotLoadModelSwitched: Couldn't load model. Switched to Basic mode.
deviceNotSupportedCompanion: Your device does not support on-device AI. Using parenting content cards instead (no internet required).
betterQualityPremium: Better Quality requires a Premium subscription.
deleteModelConfirmMessage: Delete this model? The downloaded file will be freed.
deleteGrowthRecordMessage: Are you sure you want to delete this measurement?
noHealthRecordsSubtitle: Tap the + button to add a measurement, allergy, or clinic visit.
